Defines memory and resource allocation and deallocation functions for linting in XML format.

# Purpose
The XML configuration file defines memory allocation and deallocation functions for various components in a software system. It categorizes these functions into sections such as memory management, layers, animations, windows, graphics, and weather. Each `<memory>` or `<resource>` element specifies the functions used to allocate (`<alloc>`) and deallocate (`<dealloc>`) resources. For example, the `<memory>` section includes functions like `malloc` and `free` for general memory management, while the `<resource>` section includes functions like `action_bar_layer_create` and `action_bar_layer_destroy` for managing UI layers. This structure helps in managing resources efficiently by clearly mapping allocation and deallocation functions for different components.
